'''鈭歱-n-w-w''' ('''kapanwewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:orthodoxise|orthodoxise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:orthodoxise|orthodoxise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-w-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapanwewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanwewoko|thipanwewoko]] || [[word:jipanwewoko|jipanwewoko]] || [[word:shipanwewoko|shipanwewoko]] || [[word:kipanwewoko|kipanwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanwewoko|thuthupanwewoko]] || [[word:jujupanwewoko|jujupanwewoko]] || [[word:shushupanwewoko|shushupanwewoko]] || [[word:kukupanwewoko|kukupanwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupanwewoko|thupanwewoko]] || [[word:jupanwewoko|jupanwewoko]] || [[word:shupanwewoko|shupanwewoko]] || [[word:kupanwewoko|kupanwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupanwewoko|thupanwewoko]] || [[word:jupanwewoko|jupanwewoko]] || [[word:shupanwewoko|shupanwewoko]] || [[word:kupanwewoko|kupanwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepanwewoko|thepanwewoko]] || [[word:jepanwewoko|jepanwewoko]] || [[word:shepanwewoko|shepanwewoko]] || [[word:kepanwewoko|kepanwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopanwewoko|thothopanwewoko]] || [[word:jojopanwewoko|jojopanwewoko]] || [[word:shoshopanwewoko|shoshopanwewoko]] || [[word:kokopanwewoko|kokopanwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopanwewoko|thopanwewoko]] || [[word:jopanwewoko|jopanwewoko]] || [[word:shopanwewoko|shopanwewoko]] || [[word:kopanwewoko|kopanwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanwewoko|thopanwewoko]] || [[word:jopanwewoko|jopanwewoko]] || [[word:shopanwewoko|shopanwewoko]] || [[word:kopanwewoko|kopanwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙panwewoko|th忙panwewoko]] || [[word:j忙panwewoko|j忙panwewoko]] || [[word:sh忙panwewoko|sh忙panwewoko]] || [[word:k忙panwewoko|k忙panwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapanwewoko|thathapanwewoko]] || [[word:jajapanwewoko|jajapanwewoko]] || [[word:shashapanwewoko|shashapanwewoko]] || [[word:kakapanwewoko|kakapanwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapanwewoko|thapanwewoko]] || [[word:japanwewoko|japanwewoko]] || [[word:shapanwewoko|shapanwewoko]] || [[word:kapanwewoko|kapanwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapanwewoko|thapanwewoko]] || [[word:japanwewoko|japanwewoko]] || [[word:shapanwewoko|shapanwewoko]] || [[word:kapanwewoko|kapanwewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
